prompt: This module is ready for its first real release. Can you prepare the release?

assertions.text: CHANGELOG.md created from scratch (did not exist before)
CHANGELOG follows Keep a Changelog header format (title, description, standards links)
CHANGELOG has categorized entries (Added section at minimum)
MyModule.psd1 ModuleVersion updated to match changelog version
Commit message follows chore(release): X.Y.Z format
